allies.rationale_text: Decision-trees helps counterfactual-reasoning recover the missing branches that make the original choice intelligible.
allies.source_quote: It allows decision-makers to view the outcome that occurred in the context of other potential outcomes at the time of the decision, helping to re-create the decision tree.

allies.rationale_text: Premortem gives counterfactual-reasoning a concrete way to work backward from failure and expose hidden branches before commitment.
Systems-thinking strengthens counterfactual-reasoning by surfacing interrelationships and unknown unknowns across the wider system.
allies.source_quote: CR helps reveal interrelationships and unexpected results.

antagonists.rationale_text: Confirmation-bias undermines counterfactual-reasoning by resisting the search for plausible opposite explanations.
antagonists.source_quote: CR directly opposes this by forcing the consideration of disconfirming evidence.

antagonists.rationale_text: Anchoring works against counterfactual-reasoning when the first judgment or first shared view narrows the branch set too early.
antagonists.source_quote: This prevents anchoring (focusing too much on a single piece of information) and ensures that alternative perspectives are generated organically.

structured_tensions.tension_text: Counterfactual-reasoning conflicts with confirmation-bias when teams search for support for the winning story instead of realistic alternatives.
structured_tensions.source_quote: When tackling a problem, team members often see support for our hypotheses in the faintest clues, while overlooking more significant, yet disconfirming information.

curation_notes.summary: The raw source is strongest on branch-recovery allies and anti-confirmation discipline, so the file keeps that bounded first-order surface.
donor_drops: Did not preserve donor multihop or scenario catalogs because this batch stops at first-order relations only.
open_questions: Hypothesis-driven problem solving is source-real, but decision-trees and premortem were the cleaner bounded anchors into the current graph vocabulary.
